series_metadata.series_title: Instant and On-Line Bids, Proposals and Contracts
series_metadata.series_description: Record includes all bids and proposals submitted by instant ticket vendors for instant ticket Lottery games; all bids and proposals submitted by On-Line vendors for On-Line Lottery games including "Request for Qualification", (RFQ's); "Invitation to Bid", (ITB's); "Request for Proposal", (RFP's), Pre-Bid conference material and other relevant information.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: digital copy in system six (6) years and one (1) day contract termination
